political.s: FEC: $128K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 6 executive donors.

charity.s: $18M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.11% of revenue) via Whole Kids Foundation.

environment.s: MSC retail partner — all wild seafood at counter is MSC-certified or Seafood Watch best-choice. ASC-certified farmed salmon + shrimp across seafood counter. [MSC certified · ASC certified]

animals.s: BBFAW 2024 Tier 2 — meat counter standards require GAP Step rating for all fresh meat sold. All fresh meat sold at Whole Foods must carry a GAP Step rating; many SKUs are Step 4+ (pasture-centred). [BBFAW Tier 2 · GAP Step 1+ (in-store) · CIWF Award · Cage-free fulfilled · MSC certified · ASC certified]

wiki.extract: Whole Foods Market, Inc. is an American multinational supermarket chain headquartered in Austin, Texas, owned wholly by Amazon, and which generally sells whole food products free from hydrogenated fats and artificial colors, flavors, and preservatives. A USDA Certified Organic grocer in the United States, the chain is popularly known for its organic selections.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

health.s: CEH historical alert: BPA in canned-food liners (lawsuit settled — Whole Foods agreed to disclosure). [CEH BPA alert]

governance.s: Wikidata: owned by Amazon; HQ Austin. (Wikidata Q1809448)
